$100k -> 1m challenge has been a bit difficult in this chop

Round tripped 6 figure pnls several times thinking each illiquid press into highs was going to be a proper move into $98-$105k

A lot of people asking me my "strat" for farming on Nado or any perp dex for that matter and the answer is quite simple:

I am not changing anything about how I trade. Im not a farmer, I am a trader. That being said, speculating on an airdrop only increases my EV when trading. If I roundtrip then the volume generated in that trade becomes points which  becomes tokens. Its no longer a -ev game.

That is the beauty of this new landscape. Im incentivized to swing harder, reckless with execution and I get rewarded for it on top of any profits that come from the activities.

🐙 Kraken 海妖亲自下场做去中心化永续 DEX：Nado @nadohq 

交易使用有Nado + INK 潜在空投预期

当前状态：已开启 Alpha 测试，一码难求，只能排队申请。

申请入口：https://t.co/JpdJFGbdGe

Kraken @krakenfx不只是做交易所了，开始参考 BNB/Base 这条路， 也已经正式下场做公链生态了。基于Optimism 超级链，Kraken 推出了自己的 L2  Ink @inkonchain，并在2024 年 12 月 18 日正式上线主网。这一步是长期战略布局，其实和 Coinbase 做 Base 是同一条路线，把中心化交易所的海量用户，无缝引导到链上 DeFi 生态中。

Kraken 成立于 2011 年，是行业最早一批的老牌交易所之一，近期完成8 亿美元融资，估值约 200 亿美元，其中约 2 亿美元来自Citadel 的战略投资（这个城堡证券挺厉害的，全球最顶级的对冲基金与做市机构之一），同时也已启动 IPO 上市路径。这也让 INK + Nado 具备了少有的资金、背书、合规和品牌四重加持。

INK链推出的前半年，基本上还比较低调，生态没啥可玩性，真正的转折点出现在下半年，官方与 AAVE 达成合作，推出链上借贷协议Tydro @tydrohq，TVL 迎来爆发式增长，从 $6M 快速升至 $300M。同时，官方也已明牌推出 $INK 代币，并明确说了没有VC / 私募份额预留，代币分发主要通过生态行为进行分发，包括空投、流动性挖矿和用户激励，整体导向非常清晰，优先扶持真实使用者和长期参与者。

$INK 代币
未来是 INK 整条 L2 的公链币，不是某一个单一应用的 Token，其定位更接近于交易所系公链的平台资产，同类型的参考对象主要是 $BNB 以及未来正式发币后的 $BASE。当然，最终估值一定取决于生态是否真的跑出来、用户是否真的留下来，如果后续生态能够持续对上产品兑现、用户增长与真实流动性，那么这种公链 + 交易所系 DEX + 平台代币 + 生态闭环的组合，将有机会成为潜力标的。

🔹Nado
就在这个时间点，Kraken 团队亲自下场推出了 INK 链上的第一个旗舰级应用Nado @nadoHQ，这是一个去中心化永续合约 DEX（Perp DEX），由 Kraken 背后团队直接开发，并全面借力 Kraken 自身的流动性、合规与交易系统能力。

按照官方的定位，Nado 被视为补齐 INK 链最核心、最缺失的专业交易场景的关键一环。一方面以「CEX 级体验 + DeFi 自托管」的方式吸引真正的职业交易员进场，另一方面也作为 INK 生态对外破圈的第一张王牌，承担起带动整条 INK 链活跃度和真实交易量增长的核心发动机角色。

这一点也很好理解，很明显的是Base 有 Avantis，BSC 有 Aster，Aptos 有 Decibel ， INK的这张牌就是Nado。

Nado的底层架构采用的是链下撮合 + 链上结算的混合模式，配合中心限价订单簿和统一保证金机制，再借助Ink L2 的毫秒级出块速度，并通过NLP 被动做市金库为长尾币提供深度。说白了就是用中心化交易所的速度和深度，换成链上自托管的安全模式。

Nado采用低手续费模式，根据过去 30 天的总交易量（做市商 + 吃单商）而定，从入门级的低费用开始，逐步提升至高级返利，鼓励用户持续参与，且不设任何限制。吃单方手续费最低至 1.5 个基点，挂单方返利最高可达 -0.8 个基点。目标用户也非常明确，就是职业交易员、策略团队和高频选手，从设计上就是为“专业交易”这个场景而生的。

私测阶段（邀请制）

目前 Nado 处在Alpha 私测阶段（邀请制），我个人用下来的感受是：UI 很简洁、交易撮合速度确实快，但由于还在封测阶段，当前可交易的资产数量还不算多，偶尔有bug。从玩法机制上看，Nado 是在 11 月 19 日启动封测，测试期大约 1 个月，现在不能自由注册，只能提交社交账号 + 钱包地址，通过审核后才会发放测试资格。

激励🪂
官方明确表示：早期参与 Nado 的真实用户，将作为后续 $INK 代币空投的重要依据。官方的运营策略应该是稀缺的受邀名额+明确的空投权益+真实产品体验筛选核心用户。所以邀请制的核心意义其实就是有效过滤刷量，把真正的交易者筛选进来。

邀请里每交易100万美元可解锁1个邀请名额，最多可获得10个，待我在交易些，有邀请码后我会在一些给非Ai的亏友。

I've been trading a bit on @nadoHQ the last few days, here's a review: (Ref links above and below): 
https://t.co/86puRmHRNR

Nado is Kraken's perps dex and partnered with INK, their chain. Nado is currently in closed beta, where you need an invite to actually sign up and try the dex. They've been live for about 4-6 weeks and although you're not SUPER early, I would still say that it's worth it to try out.

 Most big cexes have chains these days, with Base and Coinbase, MNT and Bybit, BNB and Binance, and so on. Ink is Kraken's version of this.

Although they're somewhat late to the game in both the chain and perp dex, I still think that Nado is a solid product so far. 

UI: I think is pretty clean, I have no complaints. Everything makes sense and is where it's supposed to be.

Pairs: There could be more pairs. Retail traders generally care about 2 things: UI & Pair selection, with some baseline volume. I think that they could definitely increase their shitcoin pairs and that would be appreciated. There are only about 20 total pairs (ish) to trade, most of them majors.

Functionality: Nado has all of the advanced orders that most dexes have, scale/twap/stop limit, etc. I haven't had a chance to try them quite yet but will probably check it out.

My plan: I was a bit late to farm Nado because I was still trying to do as many lighter points as I could the last month. Maybe a bad idea because the best time to farm these things is in the early stages where there aren't many people participating. I largely believe that the perp dex meta is mostly over- there are still dozens of these things that are out there, all with points programs...but I don't think that the 3rd, 4th, 5th, 6th, and so on perp dex will be very valuable. HypeLiquid and Lighter are both obvious #1 and #2 and this entire category should grow significantly over the next few years. But the bottom line  is that perp dexes are 97% the same in general and it's hard to really have a bunch of unique selling points on that last 3%. 

My plan is to farm Nado and probably mostly be done after this until the next interesting opportunity arises. Although I largely believe that you should be farming *something* if you are trading perps (for most people), I'm not sure what is next. I'll likely just keep playing on Nado for as long as it makes sense.

Monk's Pair Trading Strategy of BTC/ETH:

1⃣Strategy 1: 
Long BTC/Short ETH
Type: Market Order

Timing: When market Pumps and ETH pump is 2-3% more than BTC in % terms

Booking Profit: Close both positions when market cools and ETH loses its higher gain and overall position turns profitable including trade fees.

2⃣Strategy 2: 
Short BTC/Long ETH
Type: Market Order

>Timing: If market dumps and ETH dumps 2-3% more than BTC in % terms

>Booking Profit: Close both positions when market Pumps snd ETH regains its relatibe strength to BTC and overall position turns profitable including trade fees

Points to note:

~ Always market open both trades one after another in equal sizes in opposite directions.

~ Close positions only when overall profit including all trade fees combined for all legs of trades.

~ If the market goes against your position and the total PnL becomes negative, remain patient and average in if possible. When volatility is high and the price gap between BTC and ETH widens significantly, you can trim the position that is in profit. This size difference can help the overall trade turn green once the market cools down.

~ beware of using this strategy on high trade fees DEXs, best to use in zero or low fee DEXs.

~ works both fir scalping as well as holding for more profit. I suggest scalp with small sizes.

~ start with small size to understand the concept.

さらに独自の強みとして、『FR（Founding Rate）が特強い』という特徴もあるね👀！

まずこれまでのPERPでは…

🧩Lighter：爆速＆手数料無料（今は結構多い）
🧩Variational：手数料無料＆損失返金
🧩GRVT：Vault激つよ＆業界初のマイナス手数料
🧩Extended：Vault内の資金も証拠金に使える

などなど

こんな感じにPERP独自の売りがあったのだけど…

このNADOも『Founding Rateが大きい』という特徴がありました☺よかったよかった

例えばNADOの『SOLのFR』は現時点では1時間毎に-0.0019％

年に換算すると、まさかの-16.88％
※もちろんFRは時間ごとに変動するので監視必須

なのでNADOでSOLのロングを保有している間でも、レバを掛けると結構な報酬になります

そんでもってVariationalやGRVT側でプラスのFRを探してショートすれば、両建てでダブルで報酬が貰える感じ

つまりこのNADOもまた、両建てにかなり適していますね👀

実際にFR報酬と保有期間ボーナス狙いで

🧩FRがマイナスのNADOでロング
🧩FRがプラスのGRVT※でショート
※両建てなら、どちらかが手数料無料がお勧め

このような両建てでも、保有し続けているだけで手数料を越える報酬額が貰えることも👀

もちろんFRは急変・反転することも多いので定期的な監視必須ですが、その点は皆様もご存じかと

さらにVariationalの『返金損失』を組み合わせると、損失無しでのPERPエアドロ二重取りも、割と現実的に狙えますね

同時に最近はVOLよりも『リアルなトレード実績』に対してポイント加算が強めになる傾向ですので…

ガンガン短期間でトレードして手数料を削るよりも、両建てで2～3日放置する手法は、ポイント効率の面でも良さそうですな☺

さらに大半のPERPのTGEは、来年Q1～Q2以降がメイン！

そのため重要なのは『途中で資金がショートしないように生き残ること』かもしれません

ですのでNADOやVariationalとの両建てを活用した『FR差』で手数料を賄いながら、無料でエアドロポイントを貯めるのが良い感じ☺

どうしてもポイント配布が良さげな超初期シーズンに無理矢理ポイントを稼ごうとしてしまったけど…

長期的に見ると、手数料を最小限に抑えながら長期的にポイントを稼ぐことの方が大切かも知れないっすな👀

Variationalでは焦って単トレでVOL稼ぎをしてしまい、結局それほど効率良くなかったので、反省してます💀

GRVTのVaultに預けてポイントと報酬を稼ぐもヨシ！
※GRVTのVaultは割とマジで優秀

NADO×VariationalのFR両建てで手数料・スリペ損失を賄いながら、二重エアドロするもよし！

お金がバチクソ減り易いシーズンですから、小賢しく生き残って参りましょう☺！

One of my most anticipated features on @nadoHQ is the "scale order" a feature you can hardly see on other Dexs let's discuss:

A scale order is a powerful trading feature that lets users place multiple limit orders across different price levels with a single click. Instead of setting each order manually, traders can create a ladder of buy or sell orders arranged in ascending or descending order, depending on their market direction. 
For example, if a trader holds 1 ETH and wants to sell it in increments as the price climbs, they can set a rule such as selling 0.1 ETH for every $50 increase. Once confirmed, the system automatically distributes these sell orders across the order book at $50 intervals until the entire amount is allocated. The same logic can be applied for scaling into long or short positions.

A scaling order feature is crucial for a perp DEX because it tackles several trading limitations that professional traders commonly encounter on decentralized platforms. Here's why it matters:

1. It enables smarter position management
Scaling orders allow traders to enter or exit positions gradually instead of all at once. This reduces execution risk, smooths average entry/exit prices, and mirrors how many professionals already manage risk on CEXs and advanced trading platforms.

2. It eliminates the need to place dozens of manual limit orders
Without scaling orders, users must manually input each order level, size, and price which can be time-consuming and error-prone. A single-click ladder system saves time, prevents mistakes, and creates a much smoother workflow.

3. It improves liquidity on the order book
When traders can easily place multiple orders across many price levels, the order book becomes denser and deeper. More resting liquidity makes the DEX feel tighter, more active, and more competitive with CEXs.

4. It enhances automation without requiring bots
Most traders lack the tools or skills to create scripts or trading bots. Scaling orders effectively give retail users a built-in micro-automation tool, letting them execute professional strategies without leaving the platform.

Nado DEX has even more advanced features on the way, built on @inkonchain to serve both professional and beginner traders. Its UI and UX feel like a top-tier CEX, maybe even better while remaining fully decentralized. The scale order feature is almost ready for mainnet and is currently live on Testnet. Nado @nadoHQ 这个项目，官方推特粉丝虽然才一千出头，但背后站着的，是Kraken的原班人马。

你没看错，就是那个以安全和硬核著称的K-Po交易所。这帮人出来做DEX。他们正在用“降维打击”的方式，解决一个让所有交易员都头疼的问题。

你肯定有过这种体验：现货账户和合约账户是分开的，保证金得来回划转，非常蛋疼。Nado想干的核心，就是把这堵墙给拆了，搞一个叫“统一保证金（Unified Margin）”的东西。

就是把你的整个账户变成一个巨大的、智能的资金池。你持有的现货ETH，可以自动成为你做空BTC永续合约的保证金。你的多头和空头风险可以实时对冲，资金利用率直接拉满。

为了实现这个，他们用了一套“链下撮合+链上结算”的混合架构，跑在一个叫Ink的L2上。效果怎么样？延迟低至5-15毫秒。这已经不是普通DEX的水平了，这是在对标专业的高频交易（HFT）系统。

当然，他们也没忘了DeFi玩家。可以把稳定币存进他们的NLP金库，成为流动性提供者，被动地赚取收益。

所以，你看Nado在做什么。它在用一套CEX级别的交易引擎和风控逻辑，包裹在一个去中心化、自我托管的DEX外壳里。目标用户非常明确，就是那些对性能、资本效率和交易工具有着极高要求的交易者。

目前项目还在非常早期的内测申请阶段，但这个“Kraken基因”和“统一保证金”的组合拳，已经足够让人把它放进重点观察列表了。它想做的，可能是一个真正意义上的、链上“万能交易所”。

㊙️讲下Nado，@nadoHQ 。
极有可能一鱼双吃的机会( Nado 空投 + Ink 空投)。  

1、赛道：属于Perps Dex，构建在Ink Layer 2网络上。
2、定位：“高性能订单簿DEX”，它不是简单的AMM，而是采用混合架构：链下高性能匹配引擎 + 链上风险引擎。 
3、生态定位： 属于Ink生态的核心DEX。 
4、当前处于封闭Alpha阶段，填表申请+邀请码的机制。

重点讲下团队： 
很多人不知道和Kraken的关系，Nado之前团队叫之前叫Vertex protocol，今年7月被海妖收购，所以把之前的业务停了，也把整个dex也迁移到ink上。所以，Nado现在是属于Kraken的内部项目，不是第三方孵化的概念。  

技术架构与创新点： 
1、链下Sequencer + 链上风险引擎，接近CEX速度，减少Gas费和滑点。 
2、统一保证金系统，提升资本效率。 
3、NLP（流动性提供者金库），用户存入闲置资金做市，赚取交易费+清算奖励；也可用于Perp交易（阶段性开放）。  

代币经济学与空投机制： 
Nado尚未TGE（预计2026 Q2），积分系统即将上线。  市场表现： 当前日交易量大概：~$230M ，TVL~$10M，NLP金库>$2M，参与人数不到2000。  

价值角度： 
Nado现在是Kraken的基础设施，属于“正规军”定位。
积分猎人首选（双投 $INK + $NADO ）。 

最大的问题在于时期，在目前激烈的Perps Dex赛道，属于起跑晚的选手。  

目前体验来讲：

Ink Chain Overview:
DeFi-focused Ethereum L2 blockchain developed by Kraken.

Part of the Optimism Superchain ecosystem.

Mainnet launched December 18, 2024; current 24H volumes - 279.22M$

Nado Project History:
Perp DEX built on Ink Chain by the Vertex Protocol team, which joined the Ink Foundation in July 2025 via acquisition and full-stack merger.

VRTX token retired and treasury holdings burned to support migration to Ink L2.

Rebranded from Vertex Protocol to Nado for exclusive relaunch on Ink, focusing on enhanced DeFi primitives like on-chain exchange engine for trading, lending, borrowing, and yield.

Launch and Features: 
Private Alpha launched November 20, 2025; currently in phased rollout with less active users, but expanding access via referrals and giveaways.

Non-custodial Central Limit Order Book (CLOB) DEX.

Offers spot trading, perpetual futures, unified margin, and money markets in one on-chain platform.

Supports Spot & Perp trading already live; up to 20x leverage on majors like BTC and ETH; other Tokens BNB, SOL, XRP

Multiple collateral options including USDT0.

Unified Margin: Single wallet for spot/perp; entire portfolio (cash, spot, unrealized PnL) as one collateral

Money Market: Lending/borrowing with real yield.

Deposit/Withdraw: 0 bps fees.

Fees: 3.5 bps taker, 1 bps maker (scales lower with volume; rebates for high traders); ~$0.035 per trade reported in alpha testing.

Off-Chain Sequencer: Sub-ms latency (5-15 ms) 

On-Chain Risk Engine: Transparent, auditable, secure validation.

NLP (Nado Liquidity Provider)
USDT vault for perp liquidity provision.

Deploys idle funds into orderbook to deepen liquidity and tighten spreads; earn yield from market-making and liquidation flows.

NLP position counts as collateral for free trading while earning APY.

Automated allocation in DeFi strategies.

- APR: Coming soon.

Perpetual DEXs are everywhere right now, especially after the strong drop from Lighter ; so it’s worth taking a closer look at @NadoHQ

Nado is a CLOB-based DEX that introduces a unified margin across spot, margin, and perpetual trading

For clarity, CLOB (Central Limit Order Book) is a system where all buy and sell orders are gathered in one transparent, centralized order book

This structure is what powers most traditional exchanges and it’s exactly what Nado brings to the perp DEX space, setting it apart from many existing models

The platform is currently live and testable. 

By depositing funds and placing trades, you can explore what appears to be an early alpha stage, though early access often comes before the wider crowd notices

-Visit nado(.)xyz

-Make a deposit

➜ How to Deposit;

Nado is built by the Kraken team and is deployed on the Ink blockchain

To fund your account, you’ll need to bridge assets to Ink using a service like Jumper.

Minimum deposit: $5

Your biggest advantage is timing, so don’t ignore it.

Been a little over a week since I started trading on a new DEX so thought I’d share some early thoughts

I’ve been testing @nadoHQ which is currently in private alpha. Access is invite only and still pretty limited so it’s very early days.

What caught my attention is that Nado is built on Ink, the L2 launched by @krakenfx . Kraken isn’t running the exchange but Ink gives Nado the kind of infrastructure you actually need for a real orderbook based DEX fast execution, low fees and high throughput.

Nado is aiming to bring spot + perpetuals with unified margin on decentralized rails. If you’ve used orderbooks on CEXs, the experience here feels much closer to that than most DeFi setups.

One thing I genuinely like is the mobile trading experience. Nado has OCT (One-Click Trading) which means I don’t need to approve a transaction every single time I open or close a trade. That makes trading on my phone way smoother, especially for active positions.

After a week of trading the platform feels surprisingly smooth for a private alpha. Obviously its still early and things can change but this is the kind of project I like to get involved with before it’s crowded.
